LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER ALICIA GAMEZ' PETITION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AS THE PREVAILING PARTY AND PETITION TO CORRECT AND CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD - AWARD IS CONFIRMED WITH RESPONDENT'S NAME CORRECTED TO ALSO REFLECT HER CAPACITY AS TRUSTEE. THE PETITION IS OTHERWISE DENIED WITH EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES ON THIS PETITION IN FURTHERANCE OF SUBSTANTIAL JUSTICE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR# 7489

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER GAMEZ, ALICIA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT MCQUISTON, SUSAN ANN INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE SUSAN MCQUISTON TRUST DATED APRIL 17,2003 DISKIN, MICKEY $46,820.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,212.50 ARBITRATION FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $49,032.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS AND APPORTIONMENT OF ARBITRATION FEES
